req.title: Vital signs validation (audit)
req.statement: An Observation with category vital-signs shall have value in clinically plausible range; out-of-range shall be flagged for review. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.
expected_outcomes: flag raised if out of range

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-094 requires three test dimensions: (1) valid vital-signs Observation accepted and stored, (2) out-of-range value flagged and a review task created, and (3) boundary values at the exact edge of plausible ranges treated correctly. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation. I chose heart-rate (HR) as the representative vital sign because its normal range (60-100 bpm) gives clean boundary values. EP covers the in-range partition; BVA covers the exact boundary (60 bpm); NEG covers the flagging path for an implausible value (300 bpm). A fourth DT test covers the cross-cutting AuditEvent emission rule for all three operation outcomes, and a fifth STC test exercises the state transition from 'stored' to 'flagged-for-review'. Each test authenticates as a clinician, performs idempotent resource creation via conditional-create or unique identifiers, then deletes created resources in teardown.

tests.name: test_vital_signs_in_range_stored_successfully
preconditions: Clinician role credentials are available via <clinician_auth_fixture>
FHIR-lite server is reachable at BASE_URL
Heart-rate value 75 bpm is within the plausible range [60, 100]
actions: Authenticate as clinician
POST /Observation with category=vital-signs and HR=75 bpm
Assert HTTP 201 and resource id returned
GET /Observation/{id} and verify status=final and no flag extension
DELETE /Observation/{id} for cleanup
expected: No out-of-range flag present on resource
AuditEvent with action='C' emitted for the POST
tests.executable:
import pytest
import uuid
from <helper_fn> import get_audit_events

def test_vital_signs_in_range_stored_successfully(<clinician_auth_fixture>, fhir_client):
    obs_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "id": obs_id,
        "status": "final",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4", "display": "Heart rate"}]},
        "subject": {"reference": "Patient/test-patient-1"},
        "valueQuantity": {"value": 75, "unit": "bpm", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "/min"}
    }
    resp = fhir_client.put(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", json=payload, headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert resp.status_code in (200, 201), f"Expected 200/201, got {resp.status_code}"
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("status") == "final"
    extensions = body.get("extension", [])
    flag_urls = [e["url"] for e in extensions]
    assert "http://fhir-lite/StructureDefinition/out-of-range-flag" not in flag_urls
    audits = get_audit_events(fhir_client, obs_id, <clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert any(a.get("action") in ("C", "U") for a in audits)
    fhir_client.delete(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)

tests.name: test_vital_signs_out_of_range_flagged_and_review_task_created
preconditions: Clinician role credentials are available via <clinician_auth_fixture>
FHIR-lite server is reachable at BASE_URL
Heart-rate value 300 bpm is outside plausible range [60, 100]
actions: Authenticate as clinician
POST /Observation with category=vital-signs and HR=300 bpm
Assert HTTP 201 (resource stored)
GET /Observation/{id} and verify out-of-range flag extension present
GET /Task and verify a review task referencing the Observation exists
DELETE /Task/{task_id} and /Observation/{id} for cleanup
expected: Observation stored with out-of-range flag extension set to true
A Task with intent='proposal' and focus referencing the Observation is created
AuditEvent emitted for both the Observation POST and the Task creation
tests.executable:
import pytest
import uuid
from <helper_fn> import get_audit_events, poll_task_for_observation

def test_vital_signs_out_of_range_flagged_and_review_task_created(<clinician_auth_fixture>, fhir_client):
    obs_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "id": obs_id,
        "status": "final",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4"}]},
        "subject": {"reference": "Patient/test-patient-1"},
        "valueQuantity": {"value": 300, "unit": "bpm", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "/min"}
    }
    resp = fhir_client.put(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", json=payload, headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert resp.status_code in (200, 201)
    body = resp.json()
    extensions = {e["url"]: e for e in body.get("extension", [])}
    flag_url = "http://fhir-lite/StructureDefinition/out-of-range-flag"
    assert flag_url in extensions, "Out-of-range flag extension missing"
    assert extensions[flag_url].get("valueBoolean") is True
    task = poll_task_for_observation(fhir_client, obs_id, <clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert task is not None, "Review Task not created for out-of-range observation"
    assert task.get("intent") == "proposal"
    audits = get_audit_events(fhir_client, obs_id, <clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert len(audits) >= 1
    fhir_client.delete(f"/Task/{task['id']}", headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    fhir_client.delete(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)

tests.name: test_vital_signs_boundary_value_minimum_accepted_no_flag
preconditions: Clinician role credentials are available via <clinician_auth_fixture>
FHIR-lite server is reachable at BASE_URL
Heart-rate value 60 bpm is the exact lower boundary of plausible range [60, 100]
actions: Authenticate as clinician
POST /Observation with category=vital-signs and HR=60 bpm (exact lower bound)
Assert HTTP 201 and resource stored
Verify no out-of-range flag on returned resource
Verify no review Task created for this Observation
DELETE /Observation/{id} for cleanup
tests.executable:
import pytest
import uuid
from <helper_fn> import get_audit_events, poll_task_for_observation

def test_vital_signs_boundary_value_minimum_accepted_no_flag(<clinician_auth_fixture>, fhir_client):
    obs_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "id": obs_id,
        "status": "final",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4"}]},
        "subject": {"reference": "Patient/test-patient-1"},
        "valueQuantity": {"value": 60, "unit": "bpm", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "/min"}
    }
    resp = fhir_client.put(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", json=payload, headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert resp.status_code in (200, 201), f"Expected 200/201, got {resp.status_code}"
    body = resp.json()
    flag_url = "http://fhir-lite/StructureDefinition/out-of-range-flag"
    ext_urls = [e["url"] for e in body.get("extension", [])]
    assert flag_url not in ext_urls, "Boundary value 60 bpm incorrectly flagged"
    task = poll_task_for_observation(fhir_client, obs_id, <clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert task is None, "Review Task should not be created for boundary-valid value"
    audits = get_audit_events(fhir_client, obs_id, <clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert len(audits) >= 1, "AuditEvent missing for boundary-value observation"
    fhir_client.delete(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)

tests.name: test_audit_event_emitted_for_all_operation_types
preconditions: Clinician role credentials are available via <clinician_auth_fixture>
FHIR-lite server is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: POST (create) a valid vital-signs Observation; assert AuditEvent action=C
GET (read) the Observation; assert AuditEvent action=R
PUT (update) the Observation; assert AuditEvent action=U
DELETE the Observation; assert AuditEvent action=D
expected: Distinct AuditEvents with actions C, R, U, D recorded for the same resource id
Each AuditEvent references the clinician as agent
All four operations succeed with appropriate HTTP status codes
tests.executable:
import pytest
import uuid
from <helper_fn> import get_audit_events

def test_audit_event_emitted_for_all_operation_types(<clinician_auth_fixture>, fhir_client):
    obs_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    base_payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation", "id": obs_id, "status": "final",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4"}]},
        "subject": {"reference": "Patient/test-patient-1"},
        "valueQuantity": {"value": 72, "unit": "bpm", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "/min"}
    }
    r_create = fhir_client.put(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", json=base_payload, headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert r_create.status_code in (200, 201)
    r_read = fhir_client.get(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert r_read.status_code == 200
    base_payload["status"] = "amended"
    r_update = fhir_client.put(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", json=base_payload, headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert r_update.status_code in (200, 201)
    r_delete = fhir_client.delete(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert r_delete.status_code in (200, 204)
    audits = get_audit_events(fhir_client, obs_id, <clinician_auth_fixture>)
    recorded_actions = {a.get("action") for a in audits}
    assert recorded_actions >= {"C", "R", "U", "D"}, f"Missing audit actions: {recorded_actions}"

tests.name: test_vital_signs_state_transition_stored_to_flagged_on_update
preconditions: Clinician role credentials are available via <clinician_auth_fixture>
FHIR-lite server is reachable at BASE_URL
An in-range Observation (HR=75) already exists and is in state 'stored/valid'
actions: Create Observation with HR=75 (in-range) — state: stored/valid
Assert no flag present on resource
Update the same Observation with HR=250 (out-of-range) — state should transition to flagged
Assert out-of-range flag extension is now true
Assert a review Task referencing the Observation is created
DELETE Task and Observation for cleanup
expected: Initial resource has no out-of-range flag (state: valid)
After update to out-of-range value, flag extension is present and true (state: flagged)
Review Task created upon state transition to flagged
AuditEvent emitted for both create and update operations
tests.executable:
import pytest
import uuid
from <helper_fn> import get_audit_events, poll_task_for_observation

def test_vital_signs_state_transition_stored_to_flagged_on_update(<clinician_auth_fixture>, fhir_client):
    obs_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    flag_url = "http://fhir-lite/StructureDefinition/out-of-range-flag"
    def make_payload(hr_value):
        return {
            "resourceType": "Observation", "id": obs_id, "status": "final",
            "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
            "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4"}]},
            "subject": {"reference": "Patient/test-patient-1"},
            "valueQuantity": {"value": hr_value, "unit": "bpm", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "/min"}
        }
    r1 = fhir_client.put(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", json=make_payload(75), headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert r1.status_code in (200, 201)
    ext_urls_v1 = [e["url"] for e in r1.json().get("extension", [])]
    assert flag_url not in ext_urls_v1, "In-range value should not be flagged"
    r2 = fhir_client.put(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", json=make_payload(250), headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert r2.status_code in (200, 201)
    body_v2 = r2.json()
    exts_v2 = {e["url"]: e for e in body_v2.get("extension", [])}
    assert flag_url in exts_v2, "Out-of-range flag missing after update to implausible value"
    assert exts_v2[flag_url].get("valueBoolean") is True
    task = poll_task_for_observation(fhir_client, obs_id, <clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert task is not None, "Review Task not created after state transition to flagged"
    audits = get_audit_events(fhir_client, obs_id, <clinician_auth_fixture>)
    assert len(audits) >= 2, "Expected AuditEvents for both create and update"
    fhir_client.delete(f"/Task/{task['id']}", headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
    fhir_client.delete(f"/Observation/{obs_id}", headers=<clinician_auth_fixture>)
